nasb.text: “I will also trouble the hearts of many peoples when I bring your destruction among the nations, into lands which you have not known.

esv.text: “I will trouble the hearts of many peoples, when I bring your destruction among the nations, into the countries that you have not known.

cnv.text: 我使你在列國中滅亡的消息，傳到你所不認識的列邦的時候，我必使萬族的心感到不安。

ccb.text: “‘我把你灭亡的消息带到你不认识的列邦时，必使许多人惶恐不安。
